(b) According to the question, the direction diagram will be as follows

C←5 km→B
   Left    Left 2 km
         A ← School (Starting point)
8 km

         F ← (Final position)
   Left    Left 1 km
D←5 km

Now, BC = DE = 5 km, CD = BE = 8 km
      AB = 2 km, EF = 1 km
∴ Required distance, AF = BE - (AB + EF)
                        = 8 - (2 + 1) = 8 - 3 = 5 km

From the direction diagram, it is clear that the bus is present finally in the South direction of school. So, the driver needs to drive 5 km towards North direction to reach the school.

(c) According to the question, the direction diagram will be as follows

Office
(Final
position)    20 km         F     D
E                    1 km   Left  1 km
                B    Left  C
                  Right

                      15 km

             A
      Home (Starting point)

Now, AB = 15 km, CD = BF = 1 km
     AE = AB + BF = 15 + 1 = 16 km
     DE = 20 km
     DF = BC = 8 km
     EF = DE - DF = 20 - 8 = 12 km

∴ Required distance, AE = √(AF)² + (EF)² = √(16)² + (12)²
                        = √256 + 144 = √400 = 20 km

So, his office is 20 km North-West

(d) According to the question, the direction diagram will be as follows

Finishing
point   17 km    C
D←        ←Left
        15 km
Starting     ←Left
point      B
A     17 km

Now,   AB = CD = 17 km and BC = AD = 15 km
∴ Required distance, AD = 15 km

(b) According to the question, the direction diagram will be as follows

Starting point
                F←10 km→D      A
Final           
position
                         10 km   10 km
                    5 km
              C     B

Now,   AB = DC = 10 km, BC = DA = 5 km, ED = 10 km
∴ Required distance, EA = ED + DA = 10 + 5 = 15 km

(b) According to the question, the direction diagram will be as follows

End point
    E
       100 m
Starting      F    B
point    90 m
A           20 m
    D  30 m  C

AE is the distance between the starting point and the end point.
Now,   CD = FB = 30 m, BC = DF = 20 m, AB = 90 m
       AF = AB - FB = 90 - 30 = 60 m, ED = 100 m
       EF = ED - DF = 100 - 20 = 80 m

∴ Required distance,
       AE = √(AF)² + (EF)²    (by Pythagoras theorem)
         = √(60)² + (80)² = √3600 + 6400
         = √10000 = 100 m

(c) According to the question, the direction diagram will be as follows

A←50 km→B
40 km         30 km
↓              ↓
D←50 km→C
  10

Now,   AB = CD = 50 km, OA = 40 km
∴ Required distance, OD = OA - AD = 40 - 30 = 10 km

(c) According to the question, the direction diagram will be as follows

Starting        Finishing
point  D  15 m  E  point
A               
           Right
    25 m      25 m
    Left  Left
    B   20 m  C

Now, AB = CD = 25 m, BC = AD = 20 m, DE = 15 m
∴ Required distance, AE = AD + DE
                       AE = (20 + 15) = 35 m

Also, E is to the East of A.
